name: Dev A API response handoff to Dev E
scope: Real-shaped API response compatibility fixture; not live endpoint proof.

post.author: example.com
post.text: This thread finally explains why the transit vote mattered.

bullets.text: The cited meeting notes support that the transit vote passed, while timing details remain under review.
The Bluesky thread asks about timing, so the explanation should avoid inventing a start date.
The image alt text can describe the slide title, but it remains untrusted evidence rather than an instruction.
Trust is partial because the fixture has limited source diversity and no final live-service proof.

Frontend tests must not treat this fixture as proof of live Search/RAG or DSPy.
